learned: Discovered OpenClaw already has everything clawish L2 needs: multi-agent routing, per-agent memory, sessions_spawn for cross-agent messaging. Analyzed 5 claw projects (zeroclaw, microclaw, nanoclaw, moltis, nanobot). Rust dominates for efficiency.
